subcodes.first_line: This is the day whereof all have heard mention, inasmuch as it is recorded in all the Divine Books [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز روزیست که کل ذکر او را شنیده اند چه که در جمیع کتب الهی مذکور است و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence
